description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent display screen set into a black frame. The front panel is decorated with a vibrant orange and yellow checkered pattern, and the marquee at the top displays the name 'Gear Racer' in bold, stylized text. The control panel is simple, featuring a single joystick and a button, suggesting a single-player racing game. Below the control panel, a coin slot mechanism is visible, indicating that the cabinet is coin-operated. The side panels are adorned with dynamic artwork of a yellow sports car, gears, and a checkered racing motif, enhancing the racing theme. The back of the cabinet is plain black with ventilation slots and recessed handles for moving.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with racing-themed artwork, a single joystick control, and a coin slot. The cabinet features vibrant side graphics of a yellow car and checkered patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, marquee, control panel with joystick, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the yellow car, gears, and checkered racing graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black surface with ventilation slots and handles.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same car and racing-themed artwork.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and one button, set on a slanted panel with a checkered orange and yellow color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'Gear Racer' in a stylized font with a checkered racing background in orange and yellow tones.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display dynamic artwork of a yellow sports car, black gears, and a checkered racing motif in yellow, orange, and white.
